name: AI Meeting to CRM with Safety Gates

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "status": "error", "message": "Missing required fields: transcript, meeting_id, or participants", "execution_id": $json.execution_id } }}

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO meeting_execution_log (execution_id, status, input_snapshot, decision_log, timestamp) VALUES ('{{ $json.execution_id }}', '{{ $json.status }}', '{{ $json.input_snapshot }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.decision_log) }}', NOW())
